name: AEX Gold Inc.
summary: AEX Gold Inc. engages in the identification, acquisition, development, and exploration of gold properties in Greenland. It holds a 100% interest in the Nalunaq gold project covering an area of 22 square kilometers located in the Municipality of Kujalleq, Southern Greenland; and Vagar gold project covering an area of 292 square kilometers located in the Nanortalik gold belt. The company also holds interest in the Nuna Nutaaq license covering an area of 266 square kilometers; the Tartoq property covering an area of 248 square kilometers; the Saarloq licence covering 818 square kilometers; and the Anoritooq licence covering 1,889 square kilometers located in South Greenland. The company was formerly known as Alopex Gold Inc. and changed its name to AEX Gold Inc. in June 2018. AEX Gold Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
